assumption_text: North America demand will remain positive over the next 12 months
rationale: Recent search and sell-through trend are positive

assumption_text: Core buyers will keep preferring the mid-price band
rationale: Current realized sweet spot is stable

assumption_text: Amazon remains the main volume channel
rationale: Current channel share stays above 50 percent

assumption_text: Primary factory can keep MOQ and lead time stable
rationale: RFQ and shipment history are within range

assumption_text: No new hard regulatory block appears in the next quarter

rationale: Current landed cost and fee model support it

assumption_text: Working capital can support a 90 day test
